concerns.text: User Story 1 (Compute Information‑Theoretic Complexity Scores) has no directly anchored Success Criterion; the listed SC‑001‑SC‑004 address model performance and plot quality but do not verify that the required CSV output (atom_entropy, bond_entropy columns) is produced as described in the story’s acceptance scenarios.

Functional Requirement FR‑010 enumerates six additional information‑theoretic descriptors (degree_entropy, joint_entropy, etc.) that are not referenced by any User Story or Success Criterion, making FR‑010 an orphaned requirement.
